name: Protein Hunter
description: De novo protein design against protein and small molecule targets. Achieves high AlphaFold3 in silico success rates across both unconditional and conditional generation tasks.
capabilities: De novo protein design against protein and small molecule targets
Achieves high AlphaFold3 in silico success rates across both unconditional and conditional generation tasks

pdbFile.description: Target protein structure in PDB format (for conditional generation)

targetChains.description: Chain IDs of the target protein

smiles.description: SMILES string for small molecule target

binderLength.description: Length or length range of the designed protein

numDesigns.description: Number of protein designs to generate
